news.summary: The "Strategic Intelligence: Inflation Outlook Executive Briefing (Tenth Edition)" report is now available on ResearchAndMarkets.com. This report focuses on the potential impact of US tariffs on inflation and the global economy, along with implications for key sectors. Concerns are rising over a potential US recession in 2025 as investors analyze the economic effects of Trump's tariff strategies. Tariffs are being closely watched as a factor in economic contraction.
news.headline: Report on US tariffs' impact on inflation and global economy. Concerns over recession by 2025 as investors assess Trump's policies.

news.summary: In Washington, IPEC and COF have acknowledged five exceptional interprofessional team-based initiatives aimed at improving health outcomes and fostering community involvement.

news.summary: A new report titled "Decoding US Tariffs' Impact? (Influencers' perception analysis on the new US Trade Tariffs - 2025?)" has been recently included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The report focuses on discussions surrounding US Tariffs among Influencers between March 15 and April 10, 2025. It tracks key increases in activity and changing trends during this period. This analysis delves into the effects of tariff policies on different nations, sectors, and businesses. The report aims to highlight the influence and perceptions of Influencers regarding the new US Trade Tariffs.
news.headline: Report analyzes influencers' perception of US trade tariffs on companies like Tesla, ByteDance, Nike, Ford. Paired from March 15 to April 10, 2025.

news.summary: Sarepta Therapeutics Inc. (NASDAQ: SRPT) announced a loss of $3.42 per share in the first quarter of 2025, missing the analyst estimate of 95 cents. However, the quarterly revenue exceeded expectations, coming in at $744.86 million compared to the consensus estimate of $683.36 million. CEO Doug Ingram acknowledged facing challenges in the quarter and adjusted the company's 2025 guidance to a range of $2.3 billion to $2.6 billion. Despite headwinds in the biotech market, Sarepta remains confident due to its four life-changing therapies, strong revenue, and extensive pipeline. The company has also suspended Elevidys Gene Therapy Trials in Europe following a patient death. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Sarepta Therapeutics (SRPT) stock falls after Q1 2025 miss, $3.42 loss per share, $744.86 million revenue exceeds estimate. 2025 revenue guidance adjusted to $2.3-2.6 billion due to market pressures.

news.summary: InfuSystems Holdings (AMEX: INFU) is set to unveil its quarterly earnings on Thursday, 2025-05-08. Analysts predict the company will post an earnings per share (EPS) of -$0.03. news.summary: In Las Vegas, at the Knowledge 2025 event, ServiceNow (NYSE: NOW) and Amazon Web Services (AWS) unveiled a new collaboration to assist customers in streamlining enterprise data operations. The innovative solution aims to enhance data integration and workflow orchestration through bi-directional capabilities. As part of the ServiceNow Workflow Data Network ecosystem, this solution will enable real-time data processing. ServiceNow, known as the AI platform for business transformation, continues to drive efficiency in data management with key partners like AWS.
news.headline: ServiceNow and AWS partnership at Knowledge 2025 event introduces bi-directional data integration and workflow orchestration.

news.summary: In the past eight months, CenterPoint has completed the installation of 21,975 durable poles that are more resilient to storms. Additionally, they have undergrounded 401 miles of power lines and incorporated 4,472 automation devices. Moreover, the company has cleared 3,741 miles of high-risk vegetation and set up 84 weather monitoring stations throughout the Greater Houston area.
news.headline: CenterPoint Energy completes 90% of resiliency actions in Houston: 21,975 stronger poles, 401 miles undergrounded, 4,472 automation devices, 3,741 miles cleared, 84 weather stations installed.

news.summary: Valencia-based company Turbo Energy S.A. (Nasdaq: TURB) is currently participating in Intersolar Europe in Munich, Germany from May 7-9, 2025. Intersolar Europe, a renowned solar industry exhibition, typically draws over 110,000 attendees annually, offering a prime platform for networking with industry partners, customers, and stakeholders worldwide. Turbo Energy aims to showcase its innovative SUNBOX energy storage solutions at this event, highlighting its AI-optimized technologies. The exhibition presents a crucial opportunity for Turbo Energy to unveil its latest storage advancements, bolster existing business connections, and further solidify its presence in the global renewable energy sector.
news.headline: Turbo Energy unveils AI-optimized Sunbox energy solutions at Intersolar Europe 2025 in Munich, expecting over 110,000 participants.

news.summary: A total of 227 bridge decks located across different corridors in Indiana underwent aerial infrared thermography (aerial IR) surveys conducted by Infrasense. These assessments provided valuable data on the condition of the bridges, highlighting issues such as overlay debonding and rebar-level delamination quantities which were detected using aerial IR technology. The survey results offered insights into the structural health of the bridges, aiding in identifying areas that may require maintenance or repairs.
news.headline: Infrasense used aerial IR to evaluate 227 Indiana bridge decks, identifying overlay debonding and rebar-level delamination quantities.

news.summary: Bitcoin's price is hovering near $97,000 as traders anticipate FOMC minutes. Bitcoin must stay above $95,000 for bullish movement. Select altcoins are also holding support levels for a possible rally. Bitcoin wallets with 10-10,000 BTC acquired 81,338 BTC in 6 weeks, indicating positive sentiment. Investors are flocking to BlackRock's Bitcoin ETF, with new capital at $4.7 billion. Analysts predict Bitcoin may challenge $100,000 soon. ETH, XRP, BNB, SOL, DOGE, ADA, SUI, LINK, and AVAX prices analyzed for potential trends and support/resistance levels. Daily view from Coin360, Bitfinex data, and technical analysis provided. No investment advice given.
news.headline: BTC near $97,000, $95,000 support crucial for bullish move. Altcoins steady, BTC bulls eyeing $100,000, 81,338 BTC acquired by wallets. BlackRock's BTC fund sees $4.7B inflow past 16 days. Source: Coin360. Bitcoin must hold $95,000 to rally; experts predict a deeper correction if support cracks. Top 10 cryptos analyzed for price prediction. ETH faces resistance at $1,873, XRP, BNB, SOL, DOGE, ADA, SUI, LINK, AVAX predicted moves. No investment advice given.

news.summary: A recent report on Qatar's exploration and production highlights a positive outlook for the country's crude oil and condensate production. According to ResearchAndMarkets.com, current development plans project a notable 19% increase in production between 2025 and 2030. This growth is primarily fueled by expansions in Al-Shaheen, the largest oilfield in Qatar. Over the past few years, the field has undergone comprehensive development initiatives amounting to $6 billion, driving the anticipated surge in production levels.
news.headline: Qatar's oil production to increase by 19% between 2025-2030 due to Al-Shaheen field developments - ResearchAndMarkets.com.

news.summary: In Burlingame, California, Quadric® revealed that Kyocera Document Solutions Inc. has obtained licensing for the Chimera™ general purpose neural processor (GPNPU) intellectual property (IP) core. This will be utilized in upcoming office automation system on-chip (SoC) designs. According to Michihiro Okada, Deputy Senior General Manager at Kyocera, the decision was driven by a desire to integrate a highly adaptable and robust AI processing solution into their top-of-the-line document preparation and printing devices.
news.headline: Kyocera partners with Quadric to license Chimera GPNPU AI processor IP for their office automation systems.

This innovative technology aims to revolutionize processes in key business areas such as HR, procurement, finance, facilities, and legal. news.summary: In San Francisco, a leading Active Insurance provider called Coalition released its 2025 Cyber Claims Report. The report focuses on cyber trends affecting policyholders in 2024. Despite being the most expensive and disruptive, ransomware claims showed stability throughout the year. A significant portion (60%) of the claims in 2024 stemmed from business email compromise incidents. This report provides valuable insights for understanding and addressing emerging digital risks.
news.headline: Coalition's 2025 Cyber Claims Report shows ransomware stabilized but remains costly, with 60% of claims from email compromise.

news.summary: In Las Vegas, ServiceNow has improved its Workflow Data Fabric by introducing a new ecosystem. This enhancement aims to provide AI agents and workflows with immediate access to intelligence in real-time. This move is expected to significantly boost the efficiency and effectiveness of ServiceNow's operations. ServiceNow's Workflow Data Fabric now offers a more robust platform for leveraging AI and real-time data, which can greatly enhance decision-making processes. This development is indicative of ServiceNow's commitment to innovation and staying at the forefront of technological advancements.
news.headline: ServiceNow in Vegas enhances Workflow Data Fabric with new ecosystem for AI agents and workflows, providing real-time intelligence.

news.summary: In Las Vegas, Rimini Street, Inc. (Nasdaq: RMNI), a prominent enterprise software support provider, announced a collaboration with Apsen Farmacêutica, a Brazilian pharmaceutical company, at ServiceNow’s Knowledge 2025 event. Rimini Street, known for offering third-party support for Oracle, SAP, and VMware software, joined forces with ServiceNow to introduce an innovative approach. This partnership signifies Apsen Farmacêutica's move towards a cutting-edge operational vision.
news.headline: Rimini Street and ServiceNow partner with Apsen Farmacêutica for workflow automation. Announcement made at Knowledge 2025. Brazilian pharmaceutical manufacturer involved.

news.summary: In Portland, Oregon, EFM, a company specializing in forest investment and management, has recently completed a long-term agreement with Microsoft. This deal involves a fund investment that guarantees Microsoft's acquisition of a maximum of 3 million nature-based carbon removal credits from EFM's investment platform. As part of the agreement, there is a commitment to provide up to 700,000 credits until 2035. These credits will be sourced from a newly obtained property located in the Olympic Peninsula of Washington State. EFM is currently converting this property to a climate-friendly forest management site.
news.headline: EFM partners with Microsoft for carbon removals, with deal securing access to 3 million credits, including 700,000 by 2035.

news.summary: A recent report on the China Construction Market projects significant growth in various sectors. The industry experienced a 3.8% growth in 2024 and is anticipated to sustain this momentum with a 3.2% growth in 2025. The report covers key sectors such as Commercial, Industrial, Infrastructure, Energy and Utilities, Institutional, and Residential markets. The analysis extends up to 2029 (Q1 2025), offering insights into market trends and forecasts. The findings showcase a positive trajectory for the Chinese construction industry, highlighting ongoing developments and opportunities for growth.
news.headline: By 2025, China's construction industry is expected to grow by 3.2% in real terms, with an AAGR of 4.1% projected for 2026-2029.
